title: Message/set create returns serverFail for nonexistent chatId instead of invalidProperties
description: Message/set create: supplying a chatId that does not exist triggers an SQLite FK violation in insert_message_ext, which propagates through db_error() as a serverFail. RFC 8620 §7.1 requires invalidProperties for a bad chatId reference. The chat existence should be checked before inserting, with notFound or invalidProperties returned on failure.
